expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的木板尺寸。 [宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总尺寸，[板材厚度] 是顶、底和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Lebar], [Tinggi], [Kedalaman] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [KetebalanPapan] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Sisi, [KetebalanPapanBelakang] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Lebar], [Tinggi], [Kedalaman] adalah ukuran total, [KetebalanPapan] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [KetebalanPapanBelakang] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดไม้อัดสำหรับตู้ [ความกว้าง], [ความสูง], [ความลึก] คือขนาดรวม [ความหนาแผ่นไม้] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นบน ล่าง และข้าง [ความหนาไม้พื้นหลัง] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้พื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Chiều rộng], [Chiều cao], [Chiều sâu] là kích thước tổng, [Độ dày bảng] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [Độ dày bảng sau] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang laki ng mga tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Lapad], [Taas], [Lalim] ay kabuoang sukat, ang [Kapal ng Tabla] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Tuktok, Ibaba, at Gilid na Mga Tabla, at ang [Kapal ng Likurang Tabla] ay kapal ng materyal ng Likurang Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိမ်ရည်ညှပ်ဖြတ်မှုများအားတွက်ချက်သည်။ [အနံ့]၊ [အမြင့်]၊ [အနက်] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းရမှတ် [ပျဉ်ထည်အထူ] သည်အပေါ်၊ အောက်နှင့်ဘေးပျဉ်ထည်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်၊ [နောက်ကျောပျဉ်ထည်အထူ] သည်နောက်ကျောပျဉ်ထည်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដឹកជញ្ជូនទំហំផ្ទាំងទូ។ [ទទឹង]។ [កម្ពស់]។ [ជម្រៅ VHACM esiatD000XX02egrafnod htLG
